title: A Young Man'S Epigram On Existence
content:
A senseless school, where we must give
    Our lives that we may learn to live!
    A dolt is he who memorizes
    Lessons that leave no time for prizes.

    16 W. P. V., 1866.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Thomas Hardy, titled "A Young Man'S Epigram On Existence", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
